headline: Dycom Industries, Inc. Appoints Raejeanne Skillern to Board of Directors
summary: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla., March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Dycom Industries, Inc. (NYSE: DY) today announced the appointment of Raejeanne Skillern to its Board of Directors, effective March 24, 2026. Ms. Skillern is a highly regarded technology executive with over 30 years of leadership experience spanning hyperscale cloud, data center infrastructure, communications and artificial intelligence. She has a proven track record of leading multi-billion-dollar business units at global organizations in

headline: Jabil Inc (NYSE:JBL) Passes the Minervini Trend Template and High-Growth Momentum Screen
summary: Jabil Inc. (JBL) aligns with Mark Minervini's growth strategy, showing a strong technical uptrend backed by accelerating earnings and sales momentum.
